# Continuous Integration (Test Fixture)

Use the `ci` target to run everything:

```console
make ci
```

Use the `build` target to compile:

```console
make build
```

The `docs` target runs documentation checks:

```console
make docs
```

This implementation note must not be captured by the make-ref regex.
